data.content:
Branch: feat/foolery-e780-opencode-approvals
Commit: 008cc8c45ec7fb947b6fb1e47c253ec3bb6d6a5c

Summary:
- src/lib/opencode-approval-request.ts: empty {} / [] metadata is now absent; derives command summary from metadata.command/cmd/arguments/patterns; toolParamsDisplay falls back to that summary so the OpenCode bash rm fixture renders the rm command instead of {}.
- src/lib/approval-escalations.ts: formatApprovalDetailText falls back to patterns then permission/tool identity (and ignores raw {}/[]); ApprovalEscalation now carries logicalKey + agent identity; buildApprovalLogicalKey/notificationKey both exclude requestId/permissionId so two OpenCode events that differ only by per_dd956e814001/per_dd956e822001 collapse to one row.
- src/lib/approval-actions.ts: PendingApprovalRecord now carries beatTitle and agent identity (agentName/agentModel/agentVersion/agentCommand) so display survives without a live TerminalSession.
- src/lib/terminal-approval-session.ts: passes agent identity from session into approval; on duplicate dedupe it refreshes requestId/permissionId/replyTarget/agent fields so approve/reject still reaches OpenCode at the latest native id.
- src/stores/approval-escalation-store.ts: zustand persist (localStorage) for active approvals; upsert dedupes by logicalKey and merges latest reply target/agent fields onto the existing row.
- src/lib/approval-repo-scope.ts (new) + src/components/final-cut-view.tsx + src/components/approval-escalations-panel.tsx: Approvals tab annotates approvals with isCrossRepo, sorts active-repo first, and shows an 'Other repo: \xe2\x80\xa6/<dir>' badge plus Agent / Detected / Repo meta cells with timestamp tooltip.

Verification:
- New hermetic tests: src/lib/__tests__/opencode-approval-request.test.ts (4), src/lib/__tests__/approval-escalations-detail.test.ts (5), src/lib/__tests__/approval-repo-scope.test.ts (5), src/stores/__tests__/approval-escalation-store-coalesce.test.ts (1), src/stores/__tests__/approval-escalation-store-persistence.test.ts (2). Updated src/components/__tests__/final-cut-view-tabs.test.ts to assert repo-scoping, agent identity, and timestamp surfaces.
- Quality gates from worktree /Users/cartine/worktree-foolery-e780: bun run lint clean; bunx tsc --noEmit clean; bun run test = 301 files / 3012 passing; bun run build OK.

Reviewer pointers: confirm the dedupe key contract in src/lib/approval-escalations.ts (buildApprovalLogicalKey/buildApprovalNotificationKey both exclude requestId/permissionId by design) and the cross-repo labeling in src/components/approval-escalations-panel.tsx (isCrossRepo annotation + ApprovalRowSummary badge). Persistence is by zustand persist middleware in src/stores/approval-escalation-store.ts; partialize keeps only active statuses.
